summary: Full backend and frontend testing of 'The Program' strongman training app. All 18 backend API tests pass. Frontend onboarding steps 1-6 render correctly with Eric's pre-filled data. All 5 tabs and all 5 tools function correctly. One critical navigation bug found: after completing onboarding step6, router.replace('/(tabs)') fails to navigate - users are stuck on the final onboarding screen.

ui_bugs.issue: After clicking 'Skip for Now — Start Training' or 'Connect Lose It Later', handleFinish() saves profile to localStorage successfully but router.replace('/(tabs)') does NOT navigate. Users are stuck on /onboarding/step6. Workaround: manually navigate to /. Root cause likely an Expo Router issue with router.replace from deeply nested onboarding routes on web.
Experience and Program Start fields show '—' in Settings ATHLETE section even when profile has these values. The values appear to not be persisting from onboarding to settings display.

integration_issues.issue: router.replace('/(tabs)') from /onboarding/step6 does not work on Expo web. Profile IS saved correctly but navigation fails. Users must manually navigate to / to reach dashboard.

issues: Continue button is below scroll fold and not visible without scrolling - could confuse users. All other steps handle this better.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix router.replace('/(tabs)') navigation in step6.tsx handleFinish() - after saving profile, navigation fails on Expo web. Consider using router.push('/(tabs)'), router.navigate('/(tabs)'), or window.location replacement as web fallback.
MEDIUM: Settings ATHLETE section - Experience and Program Start show '—' even when profile has those values. Verify profile loading reads these fields correctly from localStorage.
LOW: OnboardingStep3 (step3.tsx) - scroll-required Continue button - consider sticky positioning or paddingBottom adjustment so button is always visible.
critical_code_review_comments: step6.tsx: Both 'ob-connect-loseit' and 'ob-skip-loseit' buttons call handleFinish(false) - the primary button label says 'Skip for Now — Start Training' but its testID is 'ob-connect-loseit' which is confusing. Consider swapping testIDs or renaming.
settings.tsx: profile.notifications could be undefined if older profiles don't have the notifications field - currently handled with ?? true fallback which is good.
server.py: Route /api/prs/bests/overview defined AFTER /api/prs/{exercise} - FastAPI might match 'bests' as exercise param. Consider reordering routes or using different path structure.

success_rate.frontend: 96% (25/26 test scenarios pass, 1 critical navigation bug)

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted one test log entry (SSB Box Squat, week 1) and one checkin (week 99). Both cleaned via DELETE API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The main bug is router.replace('/(tabs)') not working from step6.tsx on Expo web. After fix, test the full onboarding flow end-to-end without manually navigating. Also verify Settings shows Experience and Program Start properly after onboarding completes.
rca_of_issue: BUG: Onboarding completion navigation failure. Steps to reproduce: (1) Go to https://the-program-app.preview.emergentagent.com in a fresh browser session (2) Complete all 6 onboarding steps (3) Click 'Skip for Now — Start Training' on step6 (4) URL stays at /onboarding/step6 — does not navigate to dashboard. Root cause: router.replace('/(tabs)') fails silently on Expo web when called from /onboarding/step6. Profile IS saved to localStorage (onboardingComplete=true). Mitigation: Try router.replace('/') or add Platform.OS === 'web' check with window.location.href = '/' fallback.
